assertions.description: INCORRECT: The panelized board reports routing_complete=false with unrouted_count=40. Inspection of the unrouted list shows all 40 entries are 'unconnected-(XX-NC-PadNN)' nets — these are intentionally no-connected pads on J1 (USB-C NC pins), D13 (unused ESD IC outputs), and similar. Each appears 9 times in the pad list because the panel contains 9 board instances. These are not real unrouted signal paths — they are deliberate NC connections replicated across the panel. The connectivity analysis is misclassifying NC pad replicas as unrouted nets. The single-board PCB file correctly shows routing_complete=true.
